metadata.description: Reusable refactoring and modernization skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: java-modernization
plugins.description: Enterprise Java modernization: Java 8/11/17 to 21, Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x, javax-to-jakarta, dependency alignment, and post-migration build/test fixes — always preserving business logic exactly. Includes a searchable knowledge base (version compatibility, deprecated APIs, jakarta package map), a /java-modernization workflow command, and a java-modernizer agent.
